title: Vertex model not found error
symptom: When attempting to use the Vertex chat model with a specific model name, an error indicates that the model is not found.
applies_when: Using Google Vertex Chat Model node
root_cause: The error occurs because the specified model is not available in the default region. Google Vertex AI requires the correct region to access specific models, and if the region is not set to one that supports the model, it will return a 'model not found' error.
fix_steps: Open the Google Vertex Chat Model node settings
agent_instruction: Change the region setting to 'us-central1' in the Google Vertex Chat Model node.
